Urgent, if you are truely my brother, don't you keep hearing there that conditions here are harsh? Do you not know that our father left me in an empty house, so we have to borrow money for food for the household to have something to eat? Why do you not send me a single shekel silver in my name in a shipment? If you are truly my brother - as for me, whom can I look to apart from you? Conditions are harsh in the City. Urgent, as you hear my letter, clear yourselves, set out and come and save your father's house.
